---
title: "Kennedy Gitau Ngigi"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gitaukennedy678@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gitaukennedy
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3
---

## Actuarial Analyst & Actuarial Data Scientist

My name is Kennedy Gitau Ngigi. I am a technically orientated Actuarial Science professional working towards accreditation with the Institute and Faculty of Actuaries, with papers CS1 and CM2 currently in progress.

I am also extensively experienced as a programmer and data science engineer. I have built complex predictive models, designed relational databases, structured backend APIs, and engineered everything you see on this website! All the applications and systems linked in the navigation bar above are my original projects, showcasing my ability to deliver complete, end-to-end data science and machine learning pipelines.

The combination of these core skills allows me to build robust, automated actuarial workflows. If you would like to upgrade your data infrastructure, optimize traditional actuarial systems, or deploy scalable machine learning architectures, please check out my work or get in touch.

---

## Technical Expertise

* **Actuarial Science:** Mathematical risk modeling, loss reserving, liability projections, premium pricing frameworks, and professional certification preparation (IFOA Papers CS1 & CM2 in progress).
* **Machine Learning & Engineering:** End-to-end deployment pipelines utilizing Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn), R (Tidyverse, Stats), FastAPI, and Streamlit.
* **Data Infrastructure:** Modern development and database design utilizing T-SQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server, Docker, Git, and cloud automation platforms.

---

## Contact Information

If you would like to discuss predictive modeling, actuarial risk analysis, or Artificial Intelligence engineering opportunities, feel free to reach out:

* **Email:** [gitaukennedy678@gmail.com](mailto:gitaukennedy678@gmail.com)
* **GitHub:** [github.com/gitaukennedy](https://github.com/gitaukennedy)
* **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3](https://linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3)
